chunli-stand-light-punch.name: Standing Light Punch
notes: Can be rapid canceled
chunli-stand-light-punch.notes_sc: Chains into 5LP/2LP/2LK; combos naturally to 5MP; Stance Cancel: -1/-8; special/DR cancel is delayed until after 2nd active frame

chunli-stand-medium-punch.name: Standing Medium Punch
chunli-stand-medium-punch.notes_sc: Good combo/frame trap starter; Stance Cancel: +3/-1; special/DR cancel is delayed until after 3rd active frame

chunli-stand-heavy-punch.name: Standing Heavy Punch
notes: Can be canceled into Serenity Stream on hit or block
chunli-stand-heavy-punch.notes_sc: Great long-ranged poke and whiff punish tool; cancelable into Stance and can input follow-ups after 16f; combos naturally to Stance LP if close enough, or stance MK/HK on Punish Counter; Stance Cancel: +6/+1 into follow-up, -4/-9 into blocking

chunli-stand-light-kick.name: Standing Light Kick
chunli-stand-light-kick.notes_sc: Stance Cancel: 0/-3; DR cancel is delayed until after 2nd active frame

chunli-stand-medium-kick.name: Standing Medium Kick
chunli-stand-medium-kick.notes_sc: Cannot hit crouching opponents; good anti-air (cannot hit cross-up); Stance Cancel: +9/+4

chunli-stand-heavy-kick.name: Standing Heavy Kick
notes: Can be canceled into Serenity Stream on hit or block
Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent
chunli-stand-heavy-kick.notes_sc: Cannot hit crouching opponents; slow but rewarding mid-range anti-air (leg/head are invulnerable to airborne strikes 14-16f); cannot hit cross-up; puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state; Stance Cancel: +10/+6 into follow-up, -3/-7 into blocking

chunli-crouch-light-punch.name: Crouching Light Punch
notes: Can be rapid canceled

chunli-crouch-medium-punch.name: Crouching Medium Punch
chunli-crouch-medium-punch.notes_sc: 1f extra recovery on whiff; decent range and hitbox disjoint for a poke; Stance Cancel: +6/+1; topmost hurtbox on frames 1-9 is vulnerable only to aerial strikes (preventing its use as an anti-air)

chunli-crouch-heavy-punch.name: Crouching Heavy Punch
notes: Forces a juggle state when the first attack hits a mid-air opponent
chunli-crouch-heavy-punch.notes_sc: 2 hits (only 2nd is cancelable); forces stand on hit; solid anti-air on frames 12-13 and 21-23 (cannot hit cross-up); 1st hit puts airborne opponent into limited juggle state (2nd hit causes air reset, but can whiff for a knockdown); counter-hit/Punish Counter bonus advantage applies to both hits; Stance Cancel: +8/+4 into follow-up, -6/-10 into blocking

chunli-crouch-light-kick.name: Crouching Light Kick
notes: Can be rapid canceled
chunli-crouch-light-kick.notes_sc: Chains into 5LP/2LP/2LK; fully cancelable (rare for a 2LK); Stance Cancel: -3/-4

chunli-crouch-medium-kick.name: Crouching Medium Kick
chunli-crouch-medium-kick.notes_sc: Good range for a cancelable low poke; Stance Cancel: +5/+2; Range: 1.477; DR cancel is delayed until after active frames

chunli-crouch-heavy-kick.name: Crouching Heavy Kick
notes: Can be canceled into Serenity Stream on hit or block
Knockdown time extended when attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter
Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

chunli-jump-light-punch.name: Jumping Light Punch
chunli-jump-light-punch.notes_sc: Fast downward-angled air-to-air; can be used as a fuzzy instant overhead vs. Dee Jay/JP/Marisa/Zangief

chunli-jump-medium-punch.name: Jumping Medium Punch
notes: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent
chunli-jump-medium-punch.notes_sc: 2 hits, can only connect once vs. grounded opponents; both hits put airborne opponents into limited juggle state; cancels to Air Lightning Legs or Air SA1 from either hit; lower body projectile invuln 7-22f (if used immediately on the way up, can avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

chunli-jump-heavy-punch.name: Jumping Heavy Punch
notes: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent
chunli-jump-heavy-punch.notes_sc: Puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state (300 less damage vs. airborne); cancelable into j.HP~j.HP even on whiff; lower body projectile invuln 9-23f (cannot be used to avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

chunli-jump-medium-kick.name: Jumping Medium Kick
notes: Has cross-up attack properties
chunli-jump-medium-kick.notes_sc: Cross-up; lower body projectile invuln 6-20f except around attack hitbox (cannot be used to avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

chunli-jump-heavy-kick.name: Jumping Heavy Kick
chunli-jump-heavy-kick.notes_sc: Can be used as a fuzzy instant overhead vs. JP/Marisa/Zangief (opponent must be in Burnout for true blockstring); lower body projectile invuln 8-19f and 8-25f on kicking leg (if used immediately on the way up, can avoid the 2nd hit of JP's OD Amnesia bombs)

chunli-jump-neutral-heavy-kick.name: Neutral Jumping Heavy Kick
notes: Has cross-up attack properties

swift-thrust.name: Swift Thrust
notes: A strike with long reach that can be canceled into special moves
swift-thrust.notes_sc: Great poke and neutral buffer tool with a disjointed hitbox and lenient hitconfirm window; Stance Cancel: +5/+1; DR cancel is delayed until after active frames

hakkei.name: Hakkei
notes: A strong attack with quick recovery time
hakkei.notes_sc: Short range combo and frame trap tool; high active frame count makes it amazing as a meaty option; Stance Cancel: +9/+3 into follow-up, -5/-11 into blocking

water-lotus-fist.name: Water Lotus Fist
notes: An overhead attack that cannot be blocked while crouching
Can be canceled into Serenity Stream on hit or block
water-lotus-fist.notes_sc: Stance Cancel: +3/-2 into follow-up, -5/-10 into blocking; 1-8f crouching state; does not allow a follow-up link (except for Punish Counter 3HP into Stance LP); puts airborne opponent into limited juggle state (e.g. after Wallsplat)

yokusen-kick.name: Yokusen Kick
notes: A jumping kick with long reach that is effective against an opponent's sweeps
Can be canceled into Serenity Stream on hit or block
Causes a crumple stun when the attack lands as a Punish Counter
Forces a juggle state when the attack lands as a Punish Counter on a mid-air opponent
Considered airborne from frames 6 - 28
yokusen-kick.notes_sc: Punish Counter crumple state can lead to Stance HK launch or Stance LP grounded combo; causes spinning free juggle state on Punish Counter vs. airborne opponents; great hitbox priority; Stance Cancel: +2/-1 into follow-up, -6/-9 into blocking; extends a lower-body hurtbox 1f before active that is vulnerable to projectiles

falling-crane.name: Falling Crane
notes: A knee strike performed after placing yourself behind your opponent while leaping into the air
Has cross-up attack properties
Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent
Considered airborne from frames 7 - 39
falling-crane.notes_sc: Side-switching overhead; can only hit cross-up (does not work on fully cornered opponents); puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state; 1f better hit advantage vs. most crouching characters; has extremely long range when performed out of Drive Rush

yoso-kick-1.name: Yoso Kick (1)
notes: A stomping attack performed while jumping. Follow-ups can be performed after the first hit connects with or is blocked by the opponent
Has cross-up attack properties
Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

yoso-kick-2.name: Yoso Kick (2)
notes: A stomping attack performed while jumping. Follow-ups can be performed after the first hit connects with or is blocked by the opponent
Has cross-up attack properties
Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

yoso-kick-3.name: Yoso Kick (3)
notes: A stomping attack performed while jumping. Follow-ups can be performed after the first hit connects with or is blocked by the opponent
Has cross-up attack properties
Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

wall-jump.name: Wall Jump
notes: While jumping, kick off a wall to perform another jump
wall-jump.notes_sc: Counter-hit state during entire duration; can be done from Back or Neutral jump if fully against the wall, or after Forward Jump against a cornered opponent

soaring-eagle-punches.name: Soaring Eagle Punches
notes: A series of attacks performed while jumping
Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent
soaring-eagle-punches.notes_sc: Can be performed on whiff; puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state

kikoken-light.name: Kikoken (Light)
notes: Fire a ki blast directly forward. Useful for attacking opponents at range

kikoken-medium.name: Kikoken (Medium)
notes: Fire a ki blast directly forward. Useful for attacking opponents at range

kikoken-heavy.name: Kikoken (Heavy)
notes: Fire a ki blast directly forward. Useful for attacking opponents at range

kikoken-od.name: Kikoken (OD)
notes: Fire a ki blast directly forward. Useful for attacking opponents at range

serenity-stream.name: Serenity Stream
notes: Adopt a very low, stationary fighting stance. While in this stance, each attack button produces different attacks
Can be canceled by any normal or unique attack that is consideres special-cancelable
Can be canceled into any branching attacks from frame 15 of the technique, as well as block
Position can be held by continually pressing down
serenity-stream.notes_sc: Crouching state 14-22f, then low profiles until exiting stance; follow-ups can be input on frame 15 at the earliest; counter-hit state for entire animation; if no follow-up, stays crouched for 57f (hold crouch to extend); can block while crouching (cannot block overheads, as this leads to Stance Exit); blocking an attack immediately exits stance and allows a Drive Reversal; can take longer to enter stance when canceled from heavy normals, giving much worse frame advantage if a follow-up is not used immediately

orchid-palm.name: Orchid Palm
notes: During serenity stream
A quick strike, performed during Serenity Stream
Values represent if Serenity Stream is held
Can start blocking from frame 17 of recovery
orchid-palm.notes_sc: No charge required to cancel into Kikoken or Spinning Bird Kick; [] refers to recovery when exiting Serenity Stream; slight low profile for entire move duration; special/DR cancel is delayed until after 4th active frame; on Perfect Parry, Chun-Li is forced to exit the stance (2f less total recovery on PP) and is in a Punish Counter state during the entire stance exit animation; when automatically transitioning into Stance Exit, Chun-Li can block for the first 2 transition frames (except on Perfect Parry)

snake-strike.name: Snake Strike
notes: During serenity stream
A forward-moving, repeatable low profile strike, performed during Serenity Stream
Values represent if Serenity Stream is held
Can start blocking from frame 20 of recovery
snake-strike.notes_sc: Low profile/upper body projectile invuln: 1-31f (exit stance) / 1-36f (remain crouched); extra-low profile 8-21f (can even go under Drive Impact); [] refers to recovery when exiting Serenity Stream; () refers to KD Adv. when exiting Serenity Stream on hit; on Perfect Parry, Chun-Li is forced to exit the stance and is in a Punish Counter state during the entire stance exit animation (1f worse PP disadvantage if she holds downback); the final active frame does not move forward (can only achieve the highest frame advantage with meaty timing, not with spacing)

lotus-fist.name: Lotus Fist
notes: During serenity stream
An overhead attack that cannot be blocked while crouching, performed during Serenity Stream
Second attack becomes an overhead only if the first attack whiffs
lotus-fist.notes_sc: No charge required to cancel into Kikoken or Spinning Bird Kick; exits Serenity Stream upon use; only first hit is an overhead; 1-2f low profile, 1-5f crouching state; 29-42f no head hurtbox

forward-strike.name: Forward Strike
notes: During serenity stream
A quick, low kick, performed during Serenity Stream
Values represent if Serenity Stream is held
Can start blocking from frame 13 of recovery
forward-strike.notes_sc: No charge required to cancel into Kikoken or Spinning Bird Kick; [] refers to recovery when exiting Serenity Stream; on Perfect Parry, Chun-Li is forced to exit the stance (5f less total recovery on PP) and is in a Punish Counter state during the entire stance exit animation; when automatically transitioning into Stance Exit, Chun-Li can block for the first 5 transition frames (except on Perfect Parry)

senpu-kick.name: Senpu Kick
notes: During serenity stream
A low kick with long reach, performed during Serenity Stream
Values represent if Serenity Stream is held
Can start blocking from frame 28 of recovery
senpu-kick.notes_sc: No charge required to cancel into Kikoken or Spinning Bird Kick; [] refers to recovery when exiting Serenity Stream; puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state; special/DR cancel is delayed until after 4th active frame; on Perfect Parry, Chun-Li is forced to exit the stance (6f less total recovery on PP) and is in a Punish Counter state during the entire stance exit animation; when automatically transitioning into Stance Exit, Chun-Li can block for the first 6 transition frames (except on Perfect Parry)

tenku-kick.name: Tenku Kick
notes: During serenity stream
A launching kick, performed during Serenity Stream. Can immediately be canceled into a jump on hit
Can only be canceled into a jump if the attack hits
tenku-kick.notes_sc: Jump cancelable on hit only; puts opponent into limited juggle state; exits Serenity Stream upon use; 1-6f crouching state

hundred-lightning-kicks-light.name: Hundred Lightning Kicks (Light)
notes: Unleash a series of high-speed kicks. Useful for creating combos out of normal attacks
Only the 2nd hit can be canceled into a Level 3 Super Art or Critical Art

hundred-lightning-kicks-medium.name: Hundred Lightning Kicks (Medium)
notes: Unleash a series of high-speed kicks. Useful for creating combos out of normal attacks
Only the 3rd hit can be canceled into a Level 3 Super Art or Critical Art

hundred-lightning-kicks-heavy.name: Hundred Lightning Kicks (Heavy)
notes: Unleash a series of high-speed kicks. Useful for creating combos out of normal attacks
Only the 4th hit can be canceled into a Level 3 Super Art or Critical Art

hundred-lightning-kicks-od.name: Hundred Lightning Kicks (OD)
notes: Unleash a series of high-speed kicks. Useful for creating combos out of normal attacks
Only the 5th hit can be canceled into a Level 3 Super Art or Critical Art
Can transition into Lightning Kick Barrage either on hit or block

lightning-kicks-barrage.name: Lightning Kicks Barrage
notes: A series of kicks that can be performed following an OD Hundred Lightning Kicks. Useful for tacking on additional damage while also knocking down your opponent

aerial-hundred-lightning-kicks-light.name: Aerial Hundred Lightning Kicks (Light)
notes: A Hundred Lightning Kicks performed while jumping. Effective when used to convert a jumping attack into a combo
Does not hit crouching opponents
3 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

aerial-hundred-lightning-kicks-medium.name: Aerial Hundred Lightning Kicks (Medium)
notes: A Hundred Lightning Kicks performed while jumping. Effective when used to convert a jumping attack into a combo
Does not hit crouching opponents
3 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

aerial-hundred-lightning-kicks-heavy.name: Aerial Hundred Lightning Kicks (Heavy)
notes: A Hundred Lightning Kicks performed while jumping. Effective when used to convert a jumping attack into a combo
Does not hit crouching opponents
3 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

aerial-hundred-lightning-kicks-od.name: Aerial Hundred Lightning Kicks (OD)
notes: A Hundred Lightning Kicks performed while jumping. Effective when used to convert a jumping attack into a combo
Does not hit crouching opponents

spinning-bird-kick-light.name: Spinning Bird Kick (Light)
spinning-bird-kick-light.name_ja: スピニングバードキック (弱)
notes: A series of rotating, upside-down kicks with your legs extended wide. This move does lots of damage, and is useful when performing combos against opponents that have left themselves wide open
Considered airborne from frames 8 - 32

spinning-bird-kick-medium.name: Spinning Bird Kick (Medium)
spinning-bird-kick-medium.name_ja: スピニングバードキック (中)
notes: A series of rotating, upside-down kicks with your legs extended wide. This move does lots of damage, and is useful when performing combos against opponents that have left themselves wide open
Considered airborne from frames 15 - 56

spinning-bird-kick-heavy.name: Spinning Bird Kick (Heavy)
spinning-bird-kick-heavy.name_ja: スピニングバードキック (強)
notes: A series of rotating, upside-down kicks with your legs extended wide. This move does lots of damage, and is useful when performing combos against opponents that have left themselves wide open
Considered airborne from frames 19 -73

spinning-bird-kick-od.name: Spinning Bird Kick (OD)
spinning-bird-kick-od.name_ja: スピニングバードキック (OD)
notes: A series of rotating, upside-down kicks with your legs extended wide. This move does lots of damage, and is useful when performing combos against opponents that have left themselves wide open
Considered airborne from frames 14 - 63

hazanshu-light.name: Hazanshu (Light)
notes: Leap forward, rotate in the air, and slam your leg downward with a powerful kick. Useful for checking an opponent's sweeps, or as a way to close distance
Bottom half of the body is projectile invincible from frames 7 - 18
Considered airborne from frames 5 - 20

invuln.projectile: Bottom half of the body is projectile invincible from frames 7 - 18

hazanshu-medium.name: Hazanshu (Medium)
notes: Leap forward, rotate in the air, and slam your leg downward with a powerful kick. Useful for checking an opponent's sweeps, or as a way to close distance
Bottom half of the body is projectile invincible from frames 7 - 21
Considered airborne from frames 6 - 24

invuln.projectile: Bottom half of the body is projectile invincible from frames 7 - 21

hazanshu-heavy.name: Hazanshu (Heavy)
notes: Leap forward, rotate in the air, and slam your leg downward with a powerful kick. Useful for checking an opponent's sweeps, or as a way to close distance
Bottom half of the body is projectile invincible from frames 7 - 26
Considered airborne from frames 6 - 29

invuln.projectile: Bottom half of the body is projectile invincible from frames 7 - 26

hazanshu-od.name: Hazanshu (OD)
notes: Leap forward, rotate in the air, and slam your leg downward with a powerful kick. Useful for checking an opponent's sweeps, or as a way to close distance
Bottom half of the body is projectile invincible from frames 7 - 21
Projectile invincible from frames 22 - 28
Considered airborne from frames 6 - 23

tensho-kicks-light.name: Tensho Kicks (Light)
notes: Rise into the air with multiple kicks. Useful for countering an opponent's jumping attacks, or as a way to close out combos
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 10
Considered airborne from frames 8 - 45

invuln.strike: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 10

tensho-kicks-medium.name: Tensho Kicks (Medium)
notes: Rise into the air with multiple kicks. Useful for countering an opponent's jumping attacks, or as a way to close out combos
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 10
Considered airborne from frames 8 - 51

invuln.strike: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 10

tensho-kicks-heavy.name: Tensho Kicks (Heavy)
notes: Rise into the air with multiple kicks. Useful for countering an opponent's jumping attacks, or as a way to close out combos
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 10
Considered airborne from frames 8 - 69

invuln.strike: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 10

tensho-kicks-od.name: Tensho Kicks (OD)
notes: Rise into the air with multiple kicks. Useful for countering an opponent's jumping attacks, or as a way to close out combos
Completely invincible from frames 1- 7
Considered airborne from frames 8 - 32
The 3rd hit of the attack comes out only if the 2nd attack hits

kikosho.name: Kikosho
notes: Create a mass of energy directly in front of you. Its swift speed and invulnerability can quickly turn the tables on an opponent
Invincible to strikes and throws from frames 1 - 7
Minimum guaranteed damage is 30%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter

invuln.strike_throw: Invincible to strikes and throws from frames 1 - 7

kikosho.notes_sc: 5-hit Super projectile; can hit cross-up (behind Chun-Li)

aerial-kikosho.name: Aerial Kikosho
notes: Fire a kikosho diagonally downward while jumping. Effective when used to convert a jumping attack into a combo
Completely invincible on frame 1
Minimum guaranteed damage is 30%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
aerial-kikosho.notes_sc: 5-hit Super projectile; can hit cross-up (behind Chun-Li); higher activation height causes longer recovery before reaching the ground

hoyokusen.name: Hoyoku-sen
notes: Move forward while unleashing a series of kicks and then launch your opponent into the air. The last hit can be immediately canceled into a jump
Completely invincible on frames 1 - 12
Minimum guaranteed damage is 40%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
The final hit can be canceled into a jump
hoyokusen.notes_sc: 12f blockstring gap before final hit (8f in Burnout); 1000 damage if only the last hit connects; last hit is forward jump cancelable and puts opponent into free juggle state on grounded hit (limited juggle state if juggled into); applies 30% scaling to Super Art gain until end of combo; Full active frame distribution: 2(1)2(1)2(1)2(2)2(1)2(1)2(1)2(11)2(2)2(2)2(2)2(2)2(2)2(2)2(23)3

soten-ranka.name: Soten Ranka
notes: Perform a roundhouse kick, knock your opponent into the air with a series of attacks, and then smash them with a devastating kick. Useful for tacking on big damage in a combo, or as a quick way to turn the tables
Completely invincible on frames 1 - 9
Minimum guaranteed damage is 50%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
Can only be canceled into from special moves
soten-ranka.notes_sc: Hits 3 times on block (true blockstring); no cinematic if 1st hit whiffs (1000 dmg total); cinematic time regenerates ~1.8 Drive bars for Chun-Li

soten-ranka-ca.name: Soten Ranka (Critical Art)
notes: When under 25% vitality
Completely invincible on frames 1 - 9
Minimum guaranteed damage is 50%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
Can only be canceled into from special moves

koshuto.name: Koshuto
notes: When near opponent
Seize your opponent by the arm, spin them around you, and throw them aside. Throws your opponent without switching places with them
Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:
- Deals 2040 damage
- Super Art gauge increases by 4000
- Forces a hard knockdown
koshuto.notes_sc: Has large pushback during throw animation, preventing corner throw loops (with frame-perfect timing, can throw loop vs. Blanka, E. Honda, and Zangief); a successful Throw Escape builds 0.5 Drive bars for the defender; Throw Escape is awarded to a random player if input simultaneously

taiji-fan.name: Taiji Fan
notes: When near opponent
Disrupt your opponent's balance with an elbow strike, scoop them up, and toss them behind you. Throws your opponent while switching places with them
Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:
- Deals 2040 damage
- Super Art gauge increases by 4000
- Forces a hard knockdown
taiji-fan.notes_sc: Side switches; in the corner, does not allow true strike/throw oki without Drive Rush; a successful Throw Escape builds 0.5 Drive bars for the defender; Throw Escape is awarded to a random player if input simultaneously

ryuseiraku.name: Ryuseiraku
notes: During a jump
When near opponent
Catch your opponent in mid-air and slam them into the ground. Throws your opponent without switching places with them
Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:
- Deals 2040 damage
- Super Art gauge increases by 4000
- Forces a hard knockdown
ryuseiraku.notes_sc: Throw height doesn't affect KD advantage, but higher connect will throw opponent farther; no throw oki but can use a ranged meaty strike against cornered opponent
